hooks.command: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .name); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); WT_PATH="$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; mkdir -p "$WT_PATH"; cd "$CWD" && just wt-provision "$WT_PATH" >&2; echo "$WT_PATH"'
bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); WT_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); cd "$CWD" && just wt-remove "$WT_PATH" >&2'
